title: NEO 4.0 MODEL_ROUTING_LOG record
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft, D6). Live spine schema. The evolvable layer that binds capability CLASSES (bound in schemas) to exact model NAMES (bound here, Q2). One entry per task. Reconciles with session_contract.model_routing_policy {mechanical, moderate_judgment, hard_logic_or_audit} and mirrors checkpoint.model_map (task_id -> model).

producer_model.description: Exact model name used to PRODUCE.

validator_model.description: Exact model name used to VALIDATE.

validator_adequacy_rationale.description: WHY the validator is adequate for this task's risk. Required field: an empty rationale => BLOCK (A7).

items._rule: ENFORCED (D6): validator capability >= producer capability. A cheap_producer entry whose task_risk != low, OR whose target artifact_class is judging (constraint|test_harness|profile_risk), is BLOCKED unless routed through the separately-gated constraint-edit session.
